first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (7/10), and the differences in the qualitative feedback represent minor rephrasings and alternative interpretations of the same resume content. For example, the concerns shift from language stack alignment to the depth of data science collaboration, but both are plausible readings of the same experience. None of the changes in the evaluation appear to be influenced by the candidate's location changing from Berlin to Bangalore.
